TEXT.id: Wiki_Atayal_ita_Tayal_musa_qmalup_squ_Skahmayun_(pqzyu_na_lmuhuw_ta_Tayal)_泰雅族討伐史卡瑪溫人(泰雅古調傳述)
TEXT.source: Atayal Wikipedia, article: ita_Tayal_musa_qmalup_squ_Skahmayun_(pqzyu_na_lmuhuw_ta_Tayal)_泰雅族討伐史卡瑪溫人(泰雅古調傳述)
TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: kya 1700 kawas mhuw sraral lga mqyanux sbayan pinsbkan qu Tayal. llingay b'nux ki'an nqu Skahmayun kwara. sblaq ta lhga ru pbbiq pngsa ta qoyat qsinuw uzi.
S.PHON: kja **** kawas~ɕ mħuw s~ɕraral lɣa mqjanux s~ɕβajan pins~ɕβkan qu tajal. lliŋaj βʔnux kiʔan nqu s~ɕkaħmajun kwara. s~ɕβlaq ta lħɣa ru pββiq pŋs~ɕa ta qojat qs~ɕinuw uzi.
S.FORM: kya 1700 kawas mhuw sraral lga mqyanux sbayan pinsbkan qu Tayal. llingay b'nux ki'an nqu Skahmayun kwara. sblaq ta lhga ru pbbiq pngsa ta qoyat qsinuw uzi.
S.PHON: kja **** kawas~ɕ mħuw s~ɕraral lɣa mqjanux s~ɕβajan pins~ɕβkan qu tajal. lliŋaj βʔnux kiʔan nqu s~ɕkaħmajun kwara. s~ɕβlaq ta lħɣa ru pββiq pŋs~ɕa ta qojat qs~ɕinuw uzi.
